mapper.sql: select merchant_id, park_id, merchant_name, business_type, service_scope, service_area, contact_name, contact_phone, address, qualification_files, remark, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from biz_merchant
mapper.select: order by create_time desc, merchant_id desc
order by create_time desc, merchant_id desc

select count(*) as totalCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = '0' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as normalCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = '1' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as disabledCount, coalesce(sum(case when status = '2' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as suspendedCount from biz_merchant
mapper.update: update biz_merchant set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where merchant_id = #{merchantId}
